title: Lumina 2.0 – AI-Based Academic Assistant
challenge: General AI tools provide broad academic answers that aren't aligned with institutional syllabus, faculty materials, or exam-oriented preparation.
solution: A RAG-based academic assistant that uses institutional notes, question banks, and faculty resources to generate syllabus-aligned, exam-oriented answers.

title: Lumina 2.0 – Conversational AI Assistant
challenge: Students face difficulty getting instant clarification tailored to their syllabus, while general AI provides generic responses that don't align with their curriculum.
solution: A conversational AI assistant where students interact through natural language to receive syllabus-oriented responses based on institutional learning resources.

title: Credit Risk Compass – AI Risk Analysis
challenge: Financial institutions need fast, reliable creditworthiness assessment. Traditional methods are slow, less interactive, and hard for non-technical users to interpret.
solution: An AI-powered credit risk platform with an interactive dashboard that predicts borrower risk levels using ML models, real-time assessment, and explainable financial insights.
